_README: Per canonical object key, up to six per-relation component lists (all coordinates in OBJECT frame, metres / unit-vector). grasp_components: ee--object grasp anchors. contact_components: obj-obj contact anchors + outward normals. support_components: supporter surface anchors + normal + footprint radius. bottom_components: supported bottom anchors. contain_components / key_components: PegInsertionSide-style container entry + containee key descriptors (empty for MS-HAB).
